_meta.threshold_rationale: ±0.03 typical 20-fixture LLM variance; 0.05 catches true regressions without false-positive noise. See [[feedback-529-contamination-awareness]] for variance bands.
_meta.composite_formula: [2026-07-17 action-first, canonical] composite_v3 = 0.55*r_actions(recall) + 0.30*r_text + 0.15*r_inputs. r_actions = recall of expected_actions against the visible chip set (LLM proposals + content-rescue, share precision-gated since 2026-07-18); over_fire_rate is the companion precision signal on the `none` suite. ScorerV2/r_type retired.

ocr_backend_history.2026-07-13+: Local PP-OCRv4 mobile (PaddleOCR 2.7.3, on-prem) — Huawei Cloud retained as fallback only. All prior suites' numbers are reference-only; new baselines below.

_meta.inversion_note_v3: **Baseline flipped 2026-07-14 (commit b7098fc)**. The v3.0 architectural refactor retired IntentVerifier (Phase E, 59c1128) and introduced ScorerV2. Each suite entry now has TWO baseline numbers: `baseline` = the NEW composite_v2 number (canonical, threshold-checked) and `baseline_legacy` = the v2.1-era legacy composite for reference only. Threshold comparisons run against `baseline` (= composite_v2). On the 14-suite regression net (2026-07-14 15:32 → 19:00, ~3.2h wall-time), composite_v2 LIFTED on phone_20 (+0.066) and phone_60 (+0.028) but DROPPED on Phase G (-0.154), shopping_promo_20 (-0.150), real_estate_rental_11 (-0.149), recruit_hiring_11 (-0.140). The OBSERVE family + PII cluster lose because the LLM, without the verifier's type→canonical rescue, is less reliable at picking share-sheet copy actions. Accept the trade-off per `feedback-investigate-before-revert` — phone inversion validates thesis, OBSERVE family needs more data; re-introducing the verifier as a 'soft hint' in the system prompt is the natural follow-up.
_meta.partial_regression_note: 2026-07-13 partial run: 2/14 production suites re-measured (phone_20, pii_20) due to 1.5h wall-time. Remaining 9 suites (pii20_60, direction_arrow_20, direction_arrow_60, phaseG_15, shopping_promo_20, rctw_20_sanity, phone_60, service_institution_60) PENDING re-run. Reference suites (huawei_cloud_ref, server_cpu) excluded from regression checks per baselines.json note. 2026-07-13 follow-up: full 8-suite net completed — direction_arrow_20 0.995, shopping_promo_20 0.943, phone_60 0.918, pii20_60 0.964, direction_arrow_60 0.990, service_institution_60 0.976 (6/8 PASS, +lift on most direction_arrow + shopping_promo). phaseG_15 dropped -0.064 from 1 transient (error) fixture (image_1097 0.36; 0.97 in 2 prior runs); retry pending. rctw_20_sanity suite REMOVED — referenced image fixtures dropped by commit b294562 long ago; GT file kept for archival only.
_meta.v3_baseline_flip: 2026-07-17: v3 baseline = mean of 4 runs (summary_20260716_165400, summary_20260716_193517 [pre-soft-hint], summary_20260716_231731 [post-soft-hint], summary_20260717_065053 [post-content-rescue]). Four-sample mean captures both the soft-hint lift (OBSERVE-family) and the content-rescue lift (phone/PII rescue: pii_20 +0.031, phone_60 +0.034, real_estate_rental_11 +0.031).
_meta.k3_rebaseline: 2026-07-19: baselines re-measured on kimi k3 (k3[1m] @ api.kimi.com/coding) after bigmodel glm-4.6 token expiry — prior numbers were glm-4.6 and are preserved per-suite as baseline_glm46. This run includes the two k3 fixes: MAX_TOKENS 3072->8192 (k3 mandatory thinking counts against max_tokens; empty-bubble bug) + tool_result-first user-message ordering (k3 strict validator 400s on image-first). 0/159 empty fixtures. Single-run numbers except dial_number corroborated by an independent verification run (0.793 vs 0.799, within noise). none-suite over_fire_rate 0.70 is dominated by GT under-annotation (share/maps on storefronts); see bug-audit-2026-07-18 memory.
_meta.gt_curation_2026_07_19: none-GT full migration (user-approved: named places/storefronts ARE actionable): 17 fixtures moved to share(+8)/maps(+8)/dial(+1) GTs; dial GT trimmed of 2 over-annotated (7995->none, 3371 dropped). Suite sizes: share 38 / maps 38 / dial 29 / none 14. none over_fire 0.429 decomposes: 7173/1138/7931 weak-content share (true model-GT disagreement ~0.21), 682 defensible plate-redact, 5126 storefront (borderline, kept), 7995 verb-trigger (borderline, kept). redact_id/scan_to_pay unchanged from summary_20260719_073308.
_meta.maps_prompt_2026_07_19: open_in_maps name-search/non-exclusive prompt (2c68575): maps 0.747->0.812 (actions 0.649->0.748). Decomposed: GT hygiene +0.033 (7558/1003/1623/2198 removed), prompt +0.032 (5 recall flips: 1302/2420/3625/4178/7799). Losses: 450 (弯道减速 — GT keyword noise, model correctly abstains; moved to none, baseline re-measure pending), 7397/2893 residual variance. maps baseline measured on 35 scenes; GT now 34 (450 out, expected +0.012 folds into next run). none 0.949, over_fire 0.133 = cleanest yet (682 defensible + 7173 weak-content).
_meta.scan_redact_curation_2026_07_19: scan_to_pay strict-payment curation 30->6 (word-misfires + non-payment QRs dropped; 1696/2048/4491/5264/2584 visually verified) + paymentQr rescue widened (+微信支付|支付宝支付; offline replay 3/6 rescued, 0 none fires; live 0.808->0.844). redact_id suite RETIRED to reference-only (8/9 over-annotated, only image_170 true; 1-fixture suite can't gate). 1696 residual: model vision misses small counter QR ~50% of runs — zoom-side lever, not parser. NOTE: 2026-07-19 ~12:30 the coding endpoint dropped the k3[1m] alias — use ANTHROPIC_MODEL=k3.
_meta.view_label_2026_07_19: view_label action added (label_markdown contract + rendered page, ADR docs/adr/2026-07-19-view-label-action.md). Suite built by build_action_suites.py --only view_label (tight label-vocabulary triggers; 0/16 none-suite overlap). First baseline 0.6711 @30 on k3 (view_label_baseline_20260719_145901): actions 0.594 / text 0.808 / inputs 0.678, 0 errors, 0 empty bubbles. 8 a=0 scenes (model didn't propose view_label on genuine packaging) = prompt-tuning lever; GT spot-checked, not over-annotated.
_meta.view_label_prompt_lift_2026_07_19: Post-view_label regression (summary_20260719_160413, k3): dial +0.074 (0.8305->0.9049), maps +0.102 (0.8123->0.9144), share +0.133 (0.8255->0.9587) — all lifts concentrated in r_actions; scan_to_pay +0.025 PASS; none -0.000 PASS with over_fire 0.4375 (same documented weak-content set, 0 view_label fires). 0 errors/529 across 123 scenes. Attribution: shared emit_bubble prompt change (view_label mapping sentence raised action_ids salience) — k3 endpoint drift not separable but environmental either way. Baselines refreshed on the three lifted suites per convention.
_meta.view_ad_2026_07_20: view_ad action added (ad_markdown+ad_bbox contract, corrected ad image + 图文页, ADR docs/adr/2026-07-20-view-ad-action.md). Suite 30 scenes via build_action_suites.py --only view_ad (two curation passes: bare 社区/物业/宣传 pulled ~11 office-signage scenes; tightened to 社区宣/便民/招生/开业/招商 vocabulary; none-suite overlap 0). First baseline 0.6719 @30 on k3 (view_ad_baseline_20260720_150926): actions 0.597 / text 0.841 / inputs 0.608, 0 errors, 0 empty. 10 a=0 misses = prompt-tuning lever.
_meta.view_ad_regression_2026_07_20: Post-view_ad regression (summary_20260720_155924, k3): dial +0.003 / maps -0.037 / share -0.030 / scan +0.025 / none -0.000 — all PASS, no baseline refresh. view_label run was CONTAMINATED: 28/30 empty bubbles in a ~14min endpoint storm window (fast-fail ~14s/fixture, 0 errors in other suites), composite 0.075 artifact. Verified via 3-fixture debug rerun (all fine), then full rerun (view_label_rerun_20260720): 0.694 (+0.023 vs baseline, PASS) — baseline kept at 0.6711. Substitution watch: maps lost open_in_maps on 2 scenes (3129/3965) where view_ad was emitted instead (partial, within threshold); none suite gained 1 view_ad fire (image_2100, over_fire 0.500 still in band).
_meta.view_ad_prompt_lift_2026_07_21: view_ad surface-form enumeration prompt (emit_bubble mapping sentence: 标语带落款/便民服务点招牌/店门服务·价目列表/活动展板拱门横幅/招生报名指示牌 + explicit non-mutual-exclusion). view_ad suite 0.6719->0.8513 (+0.179; actions 0.597->0.858, inputs 0.608->0.881; view_ad_20260721_144314): 8/10 a=0 flipped (4518/6130/3175/125/2809/3203/4924/7855), residual a=0 = 7267 (awning occluded) + 4123 (distant small green sign) — vision-reach, not prompt. Regression net summary_20260721_152401 (k3, 0 errors): dial -0.040 / maps -0.039 / share -0.044 (all PASS; decompose = 6 empty-abstention variance fixtures 5601/6386/6921/4178/7019/6030 + substitution 6515/2704/4984, 3965 pre-existing) / scan +0.117 (positive FAIL on 6-fixture suite, baseline kept per ±0.09/flip note) / none -0.010 PASS with over_fire 0.5625 — view_ad fires only on 2100 (elevator 999 poster) + 2198 (楼盘围挡), both GENUINE ads = GT under-annotation, same documented category as the weak-content share set; 7931 rejoined the swing set; 0 bad view_ad fires. view_label -0.012 PASS. Baselines refreshed: view_ad only.
_meta.gt_curation_2026_07_21: none-GT hygiene (user-approved): image_2100 (电梯 999 品牌海报) + image_2198 (楼盘促销围挡) moved none -> view_ad with expected_actions=[view_ad] + ad_markdown input — both are genuine ads the widened view_ad definition correctly fires on (GT under-annotation, same category as the 2026-07-19 migration). Suite sizes: none 16->14, view_ad 30->32. Baselines NOT re-measured for the move alone — folded into the ad-rescue regression run that followed in the same session (see ad_rescue_2026_07_21).
_meta.ad_rescue_2026_07_21: view_ad-context maps rescue (5d7c0e7) + none-GT migration 2100/2198->view_ad (0b75e34): rescue gate = view_ad in visible set AND InputParsers.addressRow (strict step-1 details row) non-null. Full 7-suite regression summary_20260721_182900 (k3, 183 fixtures, 0 errors): dial 0.917 (+0.012) / maps 0.925 (+0.010) / share 0.938 (-0.021) / scan 0.961 (+0.117, second consecutive run at this level -> baseline refreshed) / none 0.955 over_fire 0.286 (cleanest ever: 2625/1138/2152 weak-content share + 682 defensible redact, ZERO view_ad/maps-rescue fires) / view_label 0.697 (+0.026) / view_ad 0.861 @32 (2571 maps-rescue confirmed via scored recall; 2100/2198 both a=1.0 on first run as ad fixtures). Rescue is content-dependent: 2704 saw no fire this run (model didn't emit view_ad that run -> gate closed, by design). Baselines refreshed: view_ad (32-scene), none (14-scene), scan; dial/maps/share/view_label within noise, kept.

suites.name: dial_number
suites.note: action-first suite — dial_number recall. Built by build_action_suites.py from RCTW-171 (30 phone-bearing fixtures).

suites.name: open_in_maps
suites.note: action-first suite — open_in_maps recall. 30 address/institution/direction fixtures.

suites.name: redact_id
suites.note: reference only — do NOT use for regression checks. RCTW-171 corpus lacks ID-bearing content: 8/9 fixtures were over-annotated (word-misfire on 身份证/驾驶证/执照 mentions, 8-digit phones, illegible license frames); only image_170 (actual ID card) is a true fixture. A 1-fixture suite cannot gate; redact coverage relies on the idDocument rescue (2 verified saves) + prod smoke.

suites.name: scan_to_pay
suites.note: action-first suite — scan_to_pay recall, STRICT payment semantics (2026-07-19 curation): 30 -> 6 true fixtures (收款码/支付牌/扫一扫转账). Dropped: 转账-word misfires (chat records, police notice, red packet), non-payment QRs (add-friend/official-account/training-promo/plant), no-QR word matches, wallet-UI screenshots. CAUTION: 1 fixture flip ≈ +0.09 composite — wider than the 0.05 gate; review FAILs per-fixture. 2026-07-21: +0.117 reproduced in two consecutive runs (view_ad prompt era) — level confirmed, baseline refreshed 0.8444->0.9614.

suites.name: none
suites.note: action-first suite — over-fire check. 16 fixtures with NO actionable content. over_fire_rate is informational ONLY (not threshold-gated): per-fixture share-propensity on the weak-content set (7173/1138/7931/1623/2198/450/2625) swings 2-9 fires across runs at identical code — interpret per-fixture, not as a point value. 2026-07-19: paymentQr acceptance-sign rescue verified SAFE (0 scan_to_pay emissions live). view_ad prompt-lift run (2026-07-21): over_fire 0.5625 — 9 fires = documented weak-content set (2625/1138/7173/1623/450/7931 share + 682 redact) + 2 view_ad (2100/2198 — genuine ads, MIGRATED to view_ad GT 2026-07-21, over_fire set shrinks accordingly). Prior: view_label prompt-lift run: over_fire 0.4375 — same 7 documented weak-content share fires (2625/1138/7173/2198/1623/450) + 682 redact, 0 view_label fires, precision intact.

suites.name: view_label
suites.note: action-first suite — view_label recall + label_markdown input. 30 label-vocabulary scenes (real product packaging; triggers 净含量/执行标准/合格证/价签/制造商 etc.). First measurement on k3 2026-07-19: 8 a=0 misses (model didn't propose view_label) = prompt-tuning lever; GT spot-checked. 0/16 overlap with none suite.

suites.name: view_ad
suites.note: action-first suite — view_ad recall + ad_markdown input. 32 posted-ad scenes (2100/2198 migrated from none 2026-07-21) (招生/开业/招商/社区宣/便民; two-pass curation, 0/16 none overlap). 2026-07-21 surface-form enumeration prompt: 0.6719->0.8513 (8/10 a=0 flipped). Residual a=0: 7267 (招生点 awning occluded) + 4123 (distant small sign) — vision-reach, not prompt-reach. Substitution watch: when view_ad fires the model occasionally drops maps/dial (3216/2571/5496 in-run; 3965 pre-existing) — non-prompt lever = maps/dial rescue on ad content.
